warnings: Could not fetch DB max_connections — connection limit check skipped. Ask your DBA to verify your user has access to DB server variables, then verify your parallel setting manually.
Parallel=4 on ~10M rows: each worker buffers batch_size rows in memory. With wide rows this can cause high RSS. Monitor with memory_threshold_mb or reduce parallel/batch_size.

warnings: Could not fetch DB max_connections — connection limit check skipped. Ask your DBA to verify your user has access to DB server variables, then verify your parallel setting manually.

Heavy chunk: chunk_size=250000 makes each chunk query scan ~1962 MB (~250000 rows × ~8230 B/row), holding one statement — and its snapshot/locks — open that long (the source-harm a smaller chunk avoids). Consider chunk_size around 32616 to keep each chunk under ~256 MB.
diagnostics.strategy_rationale: Mode chunked (column: id, size: 250000): ~2.0M. Parallelism: single worker — large dataset with index support; parallel=1 fits the 2048 MB budget at ~144 MB peak. Risk — resumable: no — a failed run restarts from the beginning; memory: bounded to ~144 MB peak.
